title: howethoa oligophylla
intro: Howethoa oligophylla, also known as the Small-leaved Howethoa, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Howethoa oligophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Howethoa oligophylla can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
